title: AXToastData
description: Configuration interface for toast notification display options.

sections.title: Type Definition
sections.description: The complete TypeScript interface definition for toast data configuration.

props.name: icon
props.description: Optional icon to display in the toast. If not provided, a default icon based on the color type will be used.

props.name: title
props.description: Optional title text to display in the toast notification.

props.name: content
props.description: Optional content text to display in the toast notification.

props.name: location
props.description: Position where the toast should be displayed on the screen.

props.name: closeButton
props.description: Whether to show a close button on the toast notification.

props.name: color
props.description: Color scheme for the toast notification.

props.name: timeOut
props.description: Optional timeout duration in milliseconds before the toast auto-dismisses.

props.name: timeOutProgress
props.description: Whether to show a progress bar indicating the remaining time before auto-dismissal.

props.name: closeAllButton
props.description: Whether to show a button that closes all toast notifications.

props.name: pauseOnHover
props.description: Whether to pause the auto-dismissal timer when the user hovers over the toast.
